riskSummary: CYP2D6 variant with altered function (see guideline) — amitriptyline dosing may require adjustment
detail: CPIC level A guideline covers CYP2D6 and amitriptyline, atomoxetine, nortriptyline, vortioxetine.
whyItMatters: CPIC guidelines provide evidence-based recommendations for adjusting drug therapy based on pharmacogenomic results.
release: CPIC API variant and pair data
notes: Consumer arrays may not cover all alleles needed for a complete CPIC phenotype call.
Medication changes require clinical review and confirmatory testing.
